meaning: n.造反者,叛逆者,反抗者,叛乱者adj.造反的,叛逆的,反抗的v.造反,反叛,反抗,叛乱
examples: She had been a rebel at school.
Amrita becomes a bold, daring rebel.
He was taken prisoner by rebel soldiers.
French Mirages attacked rebel positions in Ouadda and N'Dele in support of government forces.
Among Kilmainham Gaol's inmates was rebel leader Robert Emmet, who was hung, drawn and quartered in 1803.
